notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Donovan Walton out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, third baseman Vaughn Grissom to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Jeremiah Jackson out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.
